topics.market_overview: India's HR-tech market is expanding as mid-market firms automate operations; buyers are price-sensitive and want fast time-to-value, with data-localisation and compliance as recurring concerns.
trends: Mid-market adoption of AI-driven HR automation is accelerating
Buyers favour fast onboarding and clear ROI over breadth
Data localisation and compliance shape vendor selection

topics.market_overview: The sales-engagement category is consolidating prospecting, sequencing and analytics; differentiation is shifting from data volume to research-grounded personalisation.
trends: Consolidation of prospecting and engagement into single platforms
Personalisation grounded in account research is becoming table stakes
AI copy quality is a key buying criterion

default.market_overview: Buyers across this category are consolidating tools, demanding measurable ROI, and adopting AI automation where it shortens time-to-value.
trends: Preference for fast onboarding and low setup cost
